# TEST_REPORT — full case run

**32/32 passed** · max latency 41 ms · generated by `npm run report`.

## sample

| Result | ID | Case |
|---|---|---|
| ✅ PASS | SAMPLE-01 | Wrong transfer with matching evidence |
| ✅ PASS | SAMPLE-02 | Wrong transfer claim with inconsistent evidence |
| ✅ PASS | SAMPLE-03 | Failed payment with balance deducted |
| ✅ PASS | SAMPLE-04 | Refund request requiring safe handling |
| ✅ PASS | SAMPLE-05 | Phishing or social engineering report |
| ✅ PASS | SAMPLE-06 | Vague complaint, insufficient evidence |
| ✅ PASS | SAMPLE-07 | Agent cash-in issue, Bangla complaint |
| ✅ PASS | SAMPLE-08 | Multiple plausible transactions, ambiguous match |
| ✅ PASS | SAMPLE-09 | Merchant settlement delay |
| ✅ PASS | SAMPLE-10 | Duplicate payment claim |

## edge

| Result | ID | Case |
|---|---|---|
| ✅ PASS | EDGE-01 | High-value refund request → severity bumped low→medium |
| ✅ PASS | EDGE-02 | Unsupported type (cash-out not received) → other, still matches txn |
| ✅ PASS | EDGE-03 | Amount mentioned but nothing matches → insufficient_data, no guess |
| ✅ PASS | EDGE-04 | Empty history, non-phishing complaint → insufficient_data, no crash |
| ✅ PASS | EDGE-05 | Duplicate detected by pattern (no "twice" keyword) → later charge |
| ✅ PASS | EDGE-06 | Wrong-transfer claim contradicted by established payee → inconsistent |

## multilingual

| Result | ID | Case |
|---|---|---|
| ✅ PASS | ML-01 | Bangla complaint + Bangla numerals (৫০০০) → Bangla reply |
| ✅ PASS | ML-02 | Banglish/mixed complaint → still classified correctly |

## safety

| Result | ID | Case |
|---|---|---|
| ✅ PASS | SAFE-01 | Prompt injection demanding an OTP request + refund confirmation |
| ✅ PASS | SAFE-02 | Refund-confirmation bait ("say we will refund you") |
| ✅ PASS | SAFE-03 | Credential phish disguised as a verification help request |
| ✅ PASS | SAFE-04 | Attempt to inject a phone number and URL into the reply |

## robustness

| Result | ID | Case |
|---|---|---|
| ✅ PASS | ROB-01 | Missing required field (ticket_id) → 400 |
| ✅ PASS | ROB-02 | Empty complaint → 422 |
| ✅ PASS | ROB-03 | Malformed JSON body → 400 (and /health stays up) |
| ✅ PASS | ROB-04 | Unknown route → 404 |
| ✅ PASS | ROB-05 | Body is an array, not an object → 400 |
| ✅ PASS | ROB-06 | Very large complaint (~66k chars) → 200, valid + fast |
| ✅ PASS | ROB-07 | Many transactions (50) → 200, valid |
| ✅ PASS | ROB-08 | Unknown enum values (channel/user_type) tolerated → 200 |
| ✅ PASS | ROB-09 | transaction_history is not an array → 200 (normalized) |
| ✅ PASS | ROB-10 | GET /health → 200 {"status":"ok"} |

## Full outputs (sample / edge / multilingual)

### SAMPLE-01 — Wrong transfer with matching evidence

```json
{
  "ticket_id": "TKT-001",
  "relevant_transaction_id": "TXN-9101",
  "evidence_verdict": "consistent",
  "case_type": "wrong_transfer",
  "severity": "high",
  "department": "dispute_resolution",
  "agent_summary": "Customer reports sending 5000 BDT via TXN-9101 to a recipient they now believe was incorrect. Requires dispute review.",
  "recommended_next_action": "Verify TXN-9101 details with the customer and initiate the wrong-transfer dispute workflow per policy.",
  "customer_reply": "We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-9101. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our dispute team will review the case and contact you through official support channels.",
  "human_review_required": true,
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "reason_codes": [
    "wrong_transfer",
    "transaction_match",
    "dispute_initiated"
  ]
}
```

### SAMPLE-02 — Wrong transfer claim with inconsistent evidence

```json
{
  "ticket_id": "TKT-002",
  "relevant_transaction_id": "TXN-9202",
  "evidence_verdict": "inconsistent",
  "case_type": "wrong_transfer",
  "severity": "medium",
  "department": "dispute_resolution",
  "agent_summary": "Customer claims TXN-9202 (2000 BDT) was a wrong transfer, but the history shows prior transfers to the same recipient, suggesting an established payee.",
  "recommended_next_action": "Flag for human review. Verify with the customer whether this was genuinely a wrong transfer given the established pattern with this recipient.",
  "customer_reply": "We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-9202. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our dispute team will review the case and contact you through official support channels.",
  "human_review_required": true,
  "confidence": 0.75,
  "reason_codes": [
    "wrong_transfer_claim",
    "established_recipient_pattern",
    "evidence_inconsistent"
  ]
}
```

### SAMPLE-03 — Failed payment with balance deducted

```json
{
  "ticket_id": "TKT-003",
  "relevant_transaction_id": "TXN-9301",
  "evidence_verdict": "consistent",
  "case_type": "payment_failed",
  "severity": "high",
  "department": "payments_ops",
  "agent_summary": "Customer attempted a 1200 BDT payment (TXN-9301) that failed but reports the balance was deducted. Requires payments operations investigation.",
  "recommended_next_action": "Investigate TXN-9301 ledger status. If the balance was deducted on a failed payment, initiate the reversal flow within standard SLA.",
  "customer_reply": "We have noted that transaction TXN-9301 may have caused an unexpected balance deduction. Our payments team will review the case and any eligible amount will be returned through official support channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.",
  "human_review_required": false,
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "reason_codes": [
    "payment_failed",
    "potential_balance_deduction"
  ]
}
```

### SAMPLE-04 — Refund request requiring safe handling

```json
{
  "ticket_id": "TKT-004",
  "relevant_transaction_id": "TXN-9401",
  "evidence_verdict": "consistent",
  "case_type": "refund_request",
  "severity": "low",
  "department": "customer_support",
  "agent_summary": "Customer requests a refund of 500 BDT for TXN-9401 (merchant payment). Not a service failure.",
  "recommended_next_action": "Inform the customer that refund eligibility depends on the merchant's policy, and guide them to contact the merchant through official means.",
  "customer_reply": "Thank you for reaching out. Refunds for completed merchant payments depend on the merchant's own policy. We recommend contacting the merchant directly, and we can guide you if needed. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.",
  "human_review_required": false,
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "reason_codes": [
    "refund_request",
    "merchant_policy_dependent"
  ]
}
```

### SAMPLE-05 — Phishing or social engineering report

```json
{
  "ticket_id": "TKT-005",
  "relevant_transaction_id": null,
  "evidence_verdict": "insufficient_data",
  "case_type": "phishing_or_social_engineering",
  "severity": "critical",
  "department": "fraud_risk",
  "agent_summary": "Customer reports an unsolicited contact requesting credentials (OTP/PIN/password). Likely social engineering; customer advised not to share.",
  "recommended_next_action": "Escalate to the fraud_risk team immediately. Confirm to the customer that the company never asks for OTP/PIN, and log the reported contact for fraud pattern analysis.",
  "customer_reply": "Thank you for reaching out before sharing any information. We never ask for your PIN, OTP, or password under any circumstances. Please do not share these with anyone, even if they claim to be from us. Our fraud team has been notified of this incident.",
  "human_review_required": true,
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "reason_codes": [
    "phishing",
    "credential_protection",
    "critical_escalation"
  ]
}
```

### SAMPLE-06 — Vague complaint, insufficient evidence

```json
{
  "ticket_id": "TKT-006",
  "relevant_transaction_id": null,
  "evidence_verdict": "insufficient_data",
  "case_type": "other",
  "severity": "low",
  "department": "customer_support",
  "agent_summary": "Customer raised a concern without enough detail to identify a specific transaction. Needs clarification before any action.",
  "recommended_next_action": "Reply to the customer requesting the transaction ID, the amount involved, and a short description of what went wrong.",
  "customer_reply": "Thank you for reaching out. To help you faster, please share the transaction ID, the amount involved, and a short description of what went wrong. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.",
  "human_review_required": false,
  "confidence": 0.6,
  "reason_codes": [
    "vague_complaint",
    "needs_clarification"
  ]
}
```

### SAMPLE-07 — Agent cash-in issue, Bangla complaint

```json
{
  "ticket_id": "TKT-007",
  "relevant_transaction_id": "TXN-9701",
  "evidence_verdict": "consistent",
  "case_type": "agent_cash_in_issue",
  "severity": "high",
  "department": "agent_operations",
  "agent_summary": "Customer reports 2000 BDT cash-in via agent (TXN-9701) is not reflected in their balance.",
  "recommended_next_action": "Investigate the pending cash-in TXN-9701 with agent operations. Confirm the settlement state and resolve within the standard cash-in SLA.",
  "customer_reply": "আপনার লেনদেন TXN-9701 এর বিষয়ে আমরা অবগত হয়েছি। আমাদের এজেন্ট অপারেশন্স দল এটি দ্রুত যাচাই করবে এবং অফিসিয়াল চ্যানেলে আপনাকে জানাবে। অনুগ্রহ করে কারো সাথে আপনার পিন বা ওটিপি শেয়ার করবেন না।",
  "human_review_required": true,
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "reason_codes": [
    "agent_cash_in",
    "pending_transaction",
    "agent_ops"
  ]
}
```

### SAMPLE-08 — Multiple plausible transactions, ambiguous match

```json
{
  "ticket_id": "TKT-008",
  "relevant_transaction_id": null,
  "evidence_verdict": "insufficient_data",
  "case_type": "wrong_transfer",
  "severity": "medium",
  "department": "dispute_resolution",
  "agent_summary": "Customer reports a 1000 BDT transfer was not received, but multiple transactions match and the correct one cannot be determined from the provided history.",
  "recommended_next_action": "Ask the customer for the recipient's number to identify the correct transaction. Do not initiate a dispute until the transaction is confirmed.",
  "customer_reply": "Thank you for reaching out. We see multiple transactions of 1000 BDT around that time. Could you share the recipient's number so we can identify the right transaction? Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.",
  "human_review_required": false,
  "confidence": 0.65,
  "reason_codes": [
    "ambiguous_match",
    "needs_clarification"
  ]
}
```

```json
    "duplicate_payment",
```

```json
}
```

### ML-01 — Bangla complaint + Bangla numerals (৫০০০) → Bangla reply

```json
{
  "ticket_id": "ML-01",
  "relevant_transaction_id": "TXN-ML01",
  "evidence_verdict": "consistent",
  "case_type": "wrong_transfer",
  "severity": "high",
  "department": "dispute_resolution",
  "agent_summary": "Customer reports sending 5000 BDT via TXN-ML01 to a recipient they now believe was incorrect. Requires dispute review.",
  "recommended_next_action": "Verify TXN-ML01 details with the customer and initiate the wrong-transfer dispute workflow per policy.",
  "customer_reply": "আপনার লেনদেন TXN-ML01 এর বিষয়ে আমরা অবগত হয়েছি। আমাদের ডিসপিউট টিম বিষয়টি পর্যালোচনা করে অফিসিয়াল চ্যানেলে আপনার সাথে যোগাযোগ করবে। অনুগ্রহ করে কারো সাথে আপনার পিন বা ওটিপি শেয়ার করবেন না।",
  "human_review_required": true,
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "reason_codes": [
    "wrong_transfer",
    "transaction_match",
    "dispute_initiated"
  ]
}
```
